Title: ALTER TABLE SET INSERT ONLY
Description: Change access of a table to allow only inserts

For details see: AlterStatement .
See also: ALTER TABLE SET READ ONLY ALTER TABLE SET READ WRITE
Associated system table: sys.tables where type in (0, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7).
Examples:
ALTER TABLE [ IF EXISTS ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
SET INSERT ONLY
